concept: Generate an action game where the protagonist harnesses crystallized memories as weapons, with each memory's emotional content determining its combat properties. Joy memories create rapid attack sequences, fear memories enable defensive barriers, while anger memories unleash powerful but difficult-to-control area effects. Memory weapons degrade with use as their emotional resonance diminishes, requiring continual collection of fresh experiences to maintain your arsenal. Enemy creatures are manifestations of forgotten memories seeking to reclaim their place in consciousness, each requiring specific emotional counters to effectively combat. The narrative reveals that you're navigating the mind of someone in a coma, fighting to reconnect fragmented memories before their consciousness fades completely.
